nodes.name: Daily 8am
nodes.notes: SF has no outbound webhooks, so this digest POLLS GET /api/v1/agents on a schedule instead of reacting to a push event. Honest tradeoff: up to 24h latency, acceptable for a daily summary.

nodes.name: Post to Slack (Incoming Webhook)
nodes.notes: Uses a generic HTTP POST to a Slack incoming-webhook URL (via $env.SF_SLACK_WEBHOOK_URL) to avoid requiring a configured Slack OAuth credential. Swap for the native n8n-nodes-base.slack node (typeVersion 2.2) if you already have a Slack credential set up in your instance.
